PTHREAD_CANCEL_ASYNCHRONOUS: SIGCANCEL delivery FIXED (SI_TKILL siginfo now stamped, no longer a silent hang), but glibc async cancellation forced-unwinds through the signal frame and libgcc does not recognize the engine sentinel handler-return trampoline as an rt_sigreturn signal frame -> crash; needs a real recognizable signal-return trampoline (large per-arch signal-frame ABI change), deferred

mq_notify SIGEV_THREAD callback never fires: glibc drives SIGEV_THREAD via an AF_NETLINK notify socket + helper thread, so firing the callback needs writing the NOTIFY_COOKIE datagram to that netlink socket on message arrival (netlink notify-socket emulation) -- too large, DEFERRED. SIGEV_SIGNAL/SIGEV_NONE fully emulated.
termios raw-mode speed/tcflush/tcdrain/tcsendbreak operations fail in the engine
pty line discipline data path: raw byte-exact, no-echo, OPOST/ONLCR, ICRNL, ECHO, FIONREAD pending count
canonical-mode line discipline: line buffering, VERASE editing, ^D EOF on empty and non-empty line
job-control signal generation: VINTR/VQUIT control chars raise SIGINT/SIGQUIT to the pty foreground group
TIOCPKT packet mode, TIOCGSID/tcgetsid session id, /dev/tty controlling-terminal reach
